name: instant-api — SLO POST /db/new success rate < 99.5% (30m)
description: Page when the rolling-30m success rate of POST /db/new drops below the 30-day SLO target (99.5%). Success = httpResponseCode < 500; 5xx counts as a failure. Sourced from Transaction events emitted by the Fiber NR middleware. POST /db/new is the canonical agent provisioning path — sustained failure means the wedge is broken.

nrql.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE numeric(httpResponseCode) < 500) FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' AND request.uri = '/db/new'
